content: We can frame Self-Refine as a single-perspective iterative bootstrap, and combine it with the multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to create a multi-perspective Self-Refine framework that leverages cross-perspective inconsistency to generate stronger self-feedback, without requiring any additional training or supervision. This hybrid framework would overcome the limitation of vanilla Self-Refine getting stuck in local optima caused by persistent blind spots in the LLM's single default perspective.
